global_context.scene_description: A cinematic editorial still: a long thermal receipt printer tape unfurling vertically down the entire frame, against a clean black background. The tape is the single hero element. The tape has a list of dated AC INSTALL price entries running down its length, in chronological order from top (May) to bottom (late July). Each line entry shows: a date (e.g., MAY 5, MAY 12, MAY 19, JUN 2, JUN 16, JUN 30, JUL 7, JUL 14, JUL 21, JUL 28) followed by a price. The early entries at the top (MAY) are printed in GREEN ink showing prices like '$8,500', '$8,800', '$9,000', '$9,500'. As the tape descends, the prices climb and the ink shifts through yellow ($10,500, $11,500), orange ($12,500, $13,000), and red at the bottom ($13,500, $14,500, $15,500). The tape is slightly curled at the top where it emerges, and trails off the bottom edge of the frame in a soft curl. Subtle theatrical side-lighting catches the texture of the thermal paper. The visual story is the gradient — green at top, red at bottom. NO header, NO context — just the tape and the climbing prices. Mood: clinical, mathematical, the relentless climb of summer demand. Editorial product-shot aesthetic with dramatic lighting, NOT documentary photo, NOT cartoon.

composition.framing: vertical tape filling height of frame, centered
composition.focal_point: the gradient — green prices at top descending to red prices at bottom

objects.label: long thermal receipt printer tape
objects.location: center of frame, vertical, fills full height

visual_attributes.color: off-white thermal paper with colored ink entries
visual_attributes.texture: slightly translucent thermal paper with subtle horizontal grain

micro_details: small header at top of tape: 'AC INSTALL — PHOENIX'
dated entries listed in chronological order, one per line
each entry has a date and a price
early MAY entries in GREEN ink, transitioning through yellow (mid May), yellow-orange (early June), orange (mid June), red-orange (late June), bright red (early July), deep crimson (late July)
tape slightly curled at top where it emerges, softly curling off bottom edge of frame
subtle creases and natural paper texture

visual_attributes.color: near-black, slight gradient to dark grey at edges
